ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city or town */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city or town */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the city belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the ward belongs to */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the electoral district the ward belongs to */,
  "voter_turnout" TEXT /* Voter turnout percentage for the ward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wards_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES electoral_districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wards_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the voter */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voter */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income of the voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting precinct */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the precinct belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., General, Primary) */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the vote was cast */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward where the vote was cast */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate the vote was cast for */,
  "write_ins" INTEGER /* Number of write-in votes for the candidate */,
  "blanks" INTEGER /* Number of blank votes cast */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the precinct */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic details of the voter */,
  "voting_precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voting precinct where the vote was cast */,
  "blank_vote_reason" TEXT /* Reason for blank votes */,
  "count_status" TEXT /* Status of vote counting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_voting_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_precinct_id") REFERENCES voting_precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, auditor) */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voter's registration details */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_votes" (
  "candidate_vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate vote record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "votes_cast" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate */,
  "vote_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of votes cast for the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards_total" (
  "wards_total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the ward's total votes record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election event */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total votes cast in the ward */,
  "turnout_percentage" TEXT /* Voter turnout percentage for the ward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wards_total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wards_total_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wards_total_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_votes" (
  "total_votes_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the total votes record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election event */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_votes_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_votes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter registration record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who registered */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the voter registered */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic details of the voter */,
  "voting_history" TEXT /* Voting history of the voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "audit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the audit event */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Status of the audit event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., election update, voter registration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electoral_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electoral district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the electoral district */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the district belongs to */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the electoral district representative's details */,
  "representative_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the electoral district representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electoral_districts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electoral_districts_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "representative_name" TEXT /* Name of the representative */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End timestamp of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_count_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote count status record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of vote counting (e.g., pending, complete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election status record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)
